title: Reproducible code for 'Gaia Sees Blazars Move: Locating Optical Flares Using Astrometry'
description:
Julia code and Makefile-based reproducible pipeline for the analysis in Plavin, 2026, 'Gaia Sees Blazars Move: Locating Optical Flares Using Astrometry'. Cross-matches VLBI and Gaia DR3 astrometry, fits a simple model to locate optical flare positions in AGNs using Gaia proper motions and light curves, and generates all publication figures.

Please see the README for more details.
